name: Spicy Brown Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Am Whole Wheat Pastry Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients: blue cornmeal, whole wheat pastry flour, baking powder, and sea salt (if using).
2. In another bowl, whisk together carob powder, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, milk or soymilk, molasses, and lemon extract until smooth.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined. The batter should be thin but pourable; it will thicken as it sits for a few minutes.
4. Grease an 8-inch square pan with cooking spray or butter.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. This recipe yields 6 large cupcakes or one 8-inch square pan of bread.
